title: Wave Amplitude and Tension
body: A sinusoidal wave travels down a taut, horizontal string with a linear mass density of $$mu=0.060$$ $$\frac{kg}{m}$$. The maximum vertical speed of the wave is $$v_y=0.30$$ $$\frac{cm}{s}$$. The wave is modeled with the wave equation $$y(x,t)=A sin\left(6x-24t\right)$$, with $$x$$ in meters and $$t$$ in seconds.
